_note: Curated Naver attribute display-value enums (Korean DATA, not UI copy). The INTERNAL completeness check (calcAttributeCompleteness) only needs a non-empty enum-valid value; full structured attributeId/valueId submission to Naver would need the LIVE category attribute schema (Desktop API lookup). '기타' is always an allowed fallback so normalization never produces free text. English keys (material/color) avoid Korean type literals (#3-1).
